wound.description: Remote browser supervisor CI failure caused by websockets dependency/API drift: missing websockets.proxy or uri.Proxy on installed package surface.

subject: commit:1b61c682805e7083e5c410af705898ed4a373102
summary: Remote CI failure in tests/tools/test_browser_supervisor.py caused by websockets dependency/API drift: websockets.asyncio.client expects websockets.proxy / uri.Proxy but installed package surface does not provide them.
rollback: git restore scoped paths before commit; no post-seal mutation
non_claim_lock: This is a proposal only. It does not modify dependencies, patch browser supervisor code, rerun CI, execute repair, or grant authority.
repair_options: Pin or align websockets dependency to a version exposing the expected proxy API.
Patch browser_supervisor import/use site to support the installed websockets API.
Add a small compatibility shim around websockets proxy imports.
